title: FYI 芒聙聰 February 2024
body_text:
FYI 芒聙聰 February 2024
FYI 芒聰聙 February 2024

We replaced all 芒聙聹CBS芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹CBS Online芒聙聺 references with 芒聙聹CAS芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹CAS Online芒聙聺.

We replaced all 芒聙聹CBS芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹CBS Online芒聙聺 references with 芒聙聹CAS芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹CAS Online芒聙聺.

Part

Part

Deposit Processing Part
We provided instructions on how to fill out Form 8996 in Section 9.3, Enrolling Business Members in Corporate Capture.
Dishonour and Return of Cheques Procedures Part
We replaced all 芒聙聹CBS芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹CBS Online芒聙聺 references with 芒聙聹CAS芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹CAS Online芒聙聺.

We replaced all 芒聙聹CBS芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹CBS Online芒聙聺 references with 芒聙聹CAS芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹CAS Online芒聙聺.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
We replaced all 芒聙聹CBS芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹CBS Online芒聙聺 references with 芒聙聹CAS芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹CAS Online芒聙聺.
We updated Sections 7.1, 7.3, and 7.5 to reflect that priority shipping is no longer offered and foreign currency orders or drafts can only be shipped via overnight delivery from now on.
In Section 10.2, we clarified that EBC will provide relevant transaction information by email after a return is requested.
